info.title: HELP:
info.description:
init       (Default Verb) initialize new convertConfig.json file if not exist
run_j      Run convert docfx yaml to xml, using json config
file(convertConfig.json)
run_x      Run convert docfx yaml to xml, using xml config
file(ConvertConfig.xml)
run_a      Run convert docfx yaml to xml, using cmd args as config values
help       Display more information on a specific command.
version    Display version information.
Docfx2xml 1.0.0
Opensquiggly.com
init       (Default Verb) initialize new convertConfig.json file if not exist
run_j      Run convert docfx yaml to xml, using json config
file(convertConfig.json)
run_x      Run convert docfx yaml to xml, using xml config
file(ConvertConfig.xml)
run_a      Run convert docfx yaml to xml, using cmd args as config values
help       Display more information on a specific command.
version    Display version information.

commands.name: init
commands.description: (Default Verb) initialize new convertConfig.json file if not exist

commands.name: run_j
commands.description: Run convert docfx yaml to xml, using json config

commands.name: run_x
commands.description: Run convert docfx yaml to xml, using xml config

commands.name: run_a
commands.description: Run convert docfx yaml to xml, using cmd args as config values

options.name: --yml
options.description: Required. Path to folder with docfx .yml files

options.name: --xml
options.description:
(Default: xml_out) Path to result folder for xml
files(created automatically if not exist)

options.name: --xsl
options.description:
Path to xslt file using for transform default xml in
OpenSquiggly

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
(Default: true) Split xml files in inner folders by
namespace

options.name: --converter
options.description:
(Default: d) Xml converter type, should be 'c' - custom,
'd' - default, 'cn' - custom without namespace xml files,
Default value is 'd'

options.name: --buildtree
options.description:
(Default: true) Build additional files for OpenSquiggly
tree format type view

commands.name: help
commands.description: Display more information on a specific command.
